title: Charles Drummond Ellis
body: Sir Charles Drummond Ellis   (11 August 1895 in Hampstead – 10 January 1980 in Cookham) was an English physicist and scientific administrator.  His work on the magnetic spectrum of the beta-rays helped to develop a better understanding of nuclear structure.
categories: British fellows of the Royal Society
Fellows of the American Physical Society
